{{ end }}
    {{ $paginator := .Paginate (where .Site.RegularPages "Section" "posts") }} {{ range $paginator.Pages }}

  1. {{ .Title }}

    {{ .Date.Format "January 2, 2006" }} {{ with .Params.palace_rooms }} {{ range . }}{{ . }}{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ with .Params.characters }} {{ range . }}{{ . }}{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ with .Params.categories }} {{ range . }}{{ . }}{{ end }} {{ end }}
    {{ with .Params.summary }}

    {{ . }}

    {{ else }} {{ with .Summary }}

    {{ . | plainify | truncate 200 }}

    {{ end }} {{ end }}
    2. {{ end }}
